summary: v5 Rank Progress Tracker endpoint (GET /api/profile/{id}/rank-progress) fully verified. 14/14 pytest cases passed including C-rank arithmetic, S-rank rank_up flag, E-rank message tier, lift_contributions sum, xp dict shape, projected_weeks ordering, 404 handling, and regression on dashboard/workouts/progress/cardio/ai-coach.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1334 lines — should be split into routes/models/helpers modules in a future refactor (>700-line guideline).

rank-progress uses 'weakest' = max(contribs.items(), key=...) which is actually the lift the algorithm assigns MOST kg to (= currently most under-ideal share). Variable name is correct semantically but the wording 'weakest' may be misleading; consider renaming to 'priority_lift' for clarity. (Not a bug — tests pass.)
projected_weeks fallback when gained==0 uses block_start_date but rate path is skipped — works as designed.
seed_data_creation: Created 8 TEST_-prefixed profiles during pytest run (C-rank, S-rank, E-rank, regression). Not cleaned up (no DELETE endpoint), but isolated by TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v5 rank-progress endpoint validated. All response fields (current_rank, next_rank, next_threshold_kg, current_total, remaining_kg, progress_pct, lift_contributions, xp{current,level,next_level_xp}, projected_weeks{min,max}, message, rank_up) verified per spec. C-rank 620→B at 700 produces remaining=80 and pct=88.6 exactly as specified. Message tiers (<50 'path is long', 75-95 mentions remaining+lift, ≥95 'Almost there', S-rank Monarch) all match. Regression suite confirms dashboard, workouts, progress, cardio, ai-coach all 200 OK.
